name: Corallina Upholstered Wooden Bench Natural Wood/Dark Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring a comfy seating experience to your entryway or sleeping quarters with this Corallina Upholstered Wooden Bench from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangular bench features natural wooden legs and brown-hue, padded upholstery to help you sit in comfort, blending effortlessly with any decor style. Give it a home in front of your bed or keep it in the entryway for a resting place you're sure to appreciate.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
